hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import subprocess, os
repo = '/Users/renatoascenso/claude code repository/my-app'
result = subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo, 'status', '--porcelain'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if result.stdout.strip():
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo, 'add', '-A'])
    msg = subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo, 'log', '-1', '--pretty=%s'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo, 'commit', '-m', 'auto-deploy: claude code changes'])
    subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo, 'push'])
" 2>/dev/null || true
